database.description: name of the database to query (see list_available_databases)

sql.description: the read-only SQL (SELECT / WITH ... SELECT) to execute; no writes. Use the dialect of the target database's engine type (from list_available_databases); for a bigquery database that is BigQuery Standard SQL with backtick-quoted `project.dataset.table`. Annotate it with concise -- comments explaining what each ambiguous part does and why, since the stored SQL is read by human reviewers

description.description: required, concise plain-language description of what this query is about and why it is being run

include_results.description: when true, inline the first page of rows in the result (only do this for small result sets)
